CIHI_RESOURCE_USE_INTENSITY.Trend note: Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) no longer exists. Data from Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) will now be attributed to Grande Prairie Regional Hospital (Alta.), Mackenzie Place (Alta.) and Queen Elizabeth II Hospital Ambulatory Care Centre (Alta.) as of December 04, 2021.

HOSPITAL_EFFICIENCY_TREND.verification: CIHI publishes hospital cost performance indicators including spending per staffed bed and hospitalizations per bed. Fiscal year figures are plausible but could not be confirmed against a specific CIHI publication.
